actions.text: A six-tonne tribute to the 55,573 airmen who lost their lives in the RAF was dedicated at Beachy Head.

actions.text: Matt Sherratt has been appointed head coach of Cardiff Blues and will work alongside Danny Wilson.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Sherratt worked with Blues head coach Danny Wilson at Bristol

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Paul John will take on the role of skills coach while he studies for a master's degree, and Graham Steadman will continue as defence coach. Steadman will be assisted by Richard Hodges. Sherratt joined Bristol's coaching staff in 2011 having previously worked with Worcester.
